revenue.label: Revenue
revenue.description: Total money received from credit transactions

transaction_volume.label: Transaction Volume
transaction_volume.description: Total number of transactions in the period

average_transaction.label: Average Transaction Value
average_transaction.description: Mean transaction amount across all transaction types

churn_risk.label: Churn Risk Accounts
churn_risk.description: Number of accounts with no activity in the last 90 days
business_rules: Use COUNT(DISTINCT AccountID) to avoid double-counting

top_channel.label: Top Channel
top_channel.description: The transaction channel with the highest volume
business_rules: Group by Channel, order by COUNT DESC, return top result

fraud_indicators.label: Fraud Indicator Transactions
fraud_indicators.description: Transactions flagged by high login attempt count, indicating potential fraud
